title: Super Powerful TNT
description: A mod that adds a few explosives including nukes. They can be used to excavate mountains and hills, expand caves, or mining.
body:
Super Powerful Tnt is a mod with some powerful explosives that start the same as normal tnt and end up highly explosive. They can be used to excavate mountains and hills, expand caves, or mining. The mod is survival friendly because all the tnt blocks are craftable. This mod is made to expand upon the tnt in the base game.

The blocks Do Not from chain reactions!

If you want an idea of the tnt block's power, go to the gallery!


Also: MCreator was used to make this project!
